import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current: String = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, parsed)
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, parsed)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      val
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      val
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out: String = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(val)
      val
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)
println(format_list(sorted))
